scripts.preview: tailwindcss -i assets/css/input.css -o assets/css/style.css --minify && hugo server --disableFastRender --navigateToChanged --templateMetrics --templateMetricsHints --buildDrafts --buildExpired --buildFuture --watch --forceSyncStatic -e production --minify
scripts.preview:example: cd exampleSite; tailwindcss -i ../assets/css/input.css -o ../assets/css/style.css --minify && hugo server --themesDir ../.. --disableFastRender --navigateToChanged --templateMetrics --templateMetricsHints --buildDrafts --buildExpired --buildFuture --watch --forceSyncStatic -e production --minify
scripts.update-modules: node ./scripts/clearModules.js && hugo mod clean --all && hugo mod get -u ./... && hugo mod tidy
